offers.description: Buy 1 Post Great Grains Cereal - Raisins- Dates & Pecans @ $7.95

metaData.Ingredients: Whole Grain Rolled Oats, Dried Fruit (Raisin, Banana), Whole Grain Rice, Sugar, Malto Dextrin, Coconut Oil, Glucose Syrup, Whole Milk Powder, Desiccated Coconut, Vegetable Oil, Wheat Flour, Corn, Pumpkin Seeds, Soluble Fiber (Inulin), Salt, Cinnamon Powder, Water, Cocoa Powder, Distarch Phosphat (Ins 1412), Sorbitol Syrup (Ins 420(Ii)), Lecithin (Ins 322(I)) (Soybeans Extract-Soya Lecithin), Synthetic Blueberry Flavor, Vitamin E (Dl-Alpha-Tocopherol), Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol), Minerals: Calcium (Calcium Phosphate Salt), Iron (Ii) Sulphat.
metaData.Key Information:
• Discover the perfect balance of taste and nutrition with our Cowhead Granola Banana Raisins blend. Featuring chewy raisins and naturally sweet banana pieces that create a comforting, wholesome snack.

It is crafted with hearty oats and lightly sweetened to ensure a delicious start to your day, or a satisfying afternoon treat. Enjoy the goodness of nature in every crunchy morsel!
metaData.Preparation:
For a classic combination, try pairing your granola with creamy whole milk, which adds richness and a satisfying contrast.

If you prefer a lighter option, almond milk offers a nutty flavor that complements the granola's crunch.

Oat milk is another fantastic choice, providing a subtly sweet and creamy base that enhances the overall experience.

For those seeking a dairy-free alternative, coconut milk brings a tropical twist, making every bite feel like a mini getaway.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place
